zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Barbara Stober於1650年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特時，她的父親Johann Jakob Stober23歲，母親Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager21歲。她於1680年1月27日與Hanß Nicolauß Müller在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特結婚。他們至少是7個女兒的父母。她去世於1717年5月13日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Barbara Stober于1650年出生在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特时，她的父亲Johann Jakob Stober23岁，母亲Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager21岁。她于1680年1月27日与Hanß Nicolauß Müller在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特结婚。他们至少是7个女儿的父母。她去世于1717年5月13日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在巴登貝爾可薩赤 卡爾茲盧斯塔福特。

nameMeanings.name: Stober
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (also Stöber): from Middle High German stöuber ‘hunting dog’, for a hunter or for a curious, restless person.

Germanized form of Sorbian Stobor: from the Old Sorbian personal name Stobor, derived from the imperative stoj ‘stand, stay’ (later interpreted as if derived from sto ‘hundred’) + the element bor ‘to fight’.

variants.name: Stoeber
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Willi.

variants.name: Stoebner
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Darrold, Helmuth.
German (also Stöbner): variant of Stöber (see Stober ). The surname Stoebner or Stöbner is very rare in Germany.

variants.name: Stover
meanings: North German (Stöver): from Middle Low German (bad)stover ‘bather, barber, worker at a public bathhouse’, mainly an occupational name, but occasionally perhaps a nickname for a dedicated bather. Compare Stoever .
English: variant of   Stopher   with intervocalic voicing of /f/ to /v/.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Barbara Stober was born in 1650, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, her father, Johann Jakob Stober, was 23 and her mother, Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager, was 21. She married Hanß Nicolauß Müller on 27 January 1680, in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. They were the parents of at least 7 daughters. She died on 13 May 1717, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Barbara Stober est née en 1650, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, son père, Johann Jakob Stober, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hanß Nicolauß Müller le 27 janvier 1680, à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Ils ont eu au moins 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 mai 1717, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Barbara Stober 1650 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Jakob Stober 23 und ihre Mutter Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager 21. Sie hat am 27. Januar 1680 in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden Hanß Nicolauß Müller geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Mai 1717 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden begraben.

Lei sposato Hanß Nicolauß Müller il 27 gennaio 1680, nel Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Stoberが1650年にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートで生まれた時，父Johann Jakob Stoberは23歳，母Anna Margaretha Batzenschlagerは21歳であった。1680年1月27日にバデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートでHanß Nicolauß Müllerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1717年5月13日に故郷で67歳で死去し，バデンベズイルクサムト カルルスルヘスタフォートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Barbara Stober(이)가 1650년 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Jakob Stober(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1680년 1월 27일 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에서 Hanß Nicolauß Müller(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1717년 5월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 바든 베지르크샘트 칼스루헤 스태포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Barbara Stober nasceu em 1650, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden, seu pai, Johann Jakob Stober, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Hanß Nicolauß Müller em 27 de janeiro de 1680, em Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Barbara Stober родилась в 1650 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден, её отцу по имени Johann Jakob Stober было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Margaretha Batzenschlager, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hanß Nicolauß Müller 27 января 1680 г. в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден. У них было по крайней мере 7 дочерей. Она умерла 13 мая 1717 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности стаффорт, безирксэмт карлсрух, баден.

Se casó con Hanß Nicolauß Müller el 27 de enero de 1680, en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijas. Murió el 13 de mayo de 1717, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Staffort, Bezirksamt Karlsruhe, Baden.
